text: This policy sets out the entitlement to annual leave for all employees of Nexora Solutions and the procedures for requesting, approving and recording leave.
sentences: This policy sets out the entitlement to annual leave for all employees of Nexora Solutions and the procedures for requesting, approving and recording leave.

text: This policy applies to all permanent full-time and part-time employees. Contractors and interns are subject to separate provisions outlined in their respective contracts.
sentences: This policy applies to all permanent full-time and part-time employees.
Contractors and interns are subject to separate provisions outlined in their respective contracts.

text:
3.1 Full-time employees are entitled to 25 working days of paid annual leave per calendar year, in addition to public holidays observed in their country of employment.
3.2 Part-time employees receive annual leave on a pro-rata basis calculated against the standard 25-day entitlement.
3.3 Contractors receive a minimum of 20 days as stulated in their contract. No additional entitlement applies.
3.4 Interns receive 15 working days of paid annual leave per calendar year.
3.5 Employees with more than 5 years of continuous service receive an additional 2 days per year, up to a maximum of 30 days total.
sentences: 3.1 Full-time employees are entitled to 25 working days of paid annual leave per calendar year, in addition to public holidays observed in their country of employment.
3.2 Part-time employees receive annual leave on a pro-rata basis calculated against the standard 25-day entitlement.
3.3 Contractors receive a minimum of 20 days as stulated in their contract.
No additional entitlement applies.
3.4 Interns receive 15 working days of paid annual leave per calendar year.
3.5 Employees with more than 5 years of continuous service receive an additional 2 days per year, up to a maximum of 30 days total.

text: Annual leave accrues from the first day of employment at a rate of 2.083 days per month for full-time employees. Leave may not be taken in excess of accrued entitlement during the first 3 months of employment.
sentences: Annual leave accrues from the first day of employment at a rate of 2.083 days per month for full-time employees.
Leave may not be taken in excess of accrued entitlement during the first 3 months of employment.

text:
5.1 All leave requests must be submitted through the HR system at least 10 working days in advance for periods of 5 or more consecutive days.
5.2 For periods of 1 to 4 days, 3 working days' advance notice is required.
5.3 Leave requests must be approved by the employee's direct line manager. In the manager's absence, requests are escalated to the department head.
5.4 Nexora Solutions reserves the right to decline leave requests where business needs require it, particularly during peak delivery periods.
sentences: 5.1 All leave requests must be submitted through the HR system at least 10 working days in advance for periods of 5 or more consecutive days.
5.2 For periods of 1 to 4 days, 3 working days' advance notice is required.
5.3 Leave requests must be approved by the employee's direct line manager.
In the manager's absence, requests are escalated to the department head.
5.4 Nexora Solutions reserves the right to decline leave requests where business needs require it, particularly during peak delivery periods.

text:
6.1 Employees may carry over a maximum of 5 unused leave days into the following calendar year.
6.2 Carried-over leave must be used by 31 March of the following year. Any unused days beyond this date will be forfeited.
6.3 Exceptions may be granted in cases of extended sick leave or maternity/paternity leave where the employee was unable to use leave during the year.
sentences: 6.1 Employees may carry over a maximum of 5 unused leave days into the following calendar year.
6.2 Carried-over leave must be used by 31 March of the following year.
Any unused days beyond this date will be forfeited.
6.3 Exceptions may be granted in cases of extended sick leave or maternity/paternity leave where the employee was unable to use leave during the year.

text: Employees are entitled to all public holidays applicable in their country and city of employment. Where an employee is required to work on a public holiday, they will receive a substitute day off to be taken within 60 days.
sentences: Employees are entitled to all public holidays applicable in their country and city of employment.
Where an employee is required to work on a public holiday, they will receive a substitute day off to be taken within 60 days.

text: For questions regarding this policy, contact the HR team at hr@nexora.com or your HR Business Partner.
sentences: For questions regarding this policy, contact the HR team at hr@nexora.com or your HR Business Partner.

text: Nexora Solutions operates on the principles of integrity, respect, innovation, and accountability. Every employee is expected to embody these values in their daily conduct.
sentences: Nexora Solutions operates on the principles of integrity, respect, innovation, and accountability.
Every employee is expected to embody these values in their daily conduct.

text:
2.1 Employees are expected to treat all colleagues, clients, and partners with respect and professionalism.
2.2 Harassment, bullying, or discrimination of any kind — based on gender, age, ethnicity, religion, disability, sexual orientation, or any other characteristic — will not be tolerated and may result in summary dismissal.
2.3 Employees must not engage in activities that create a conflict of interest with their duties at Nexora Solutions. Any potential conflict must be disclosed to HR in writing.
sentences: 2.1 Employees are expected to treat all colleagues, clients, and partners with respect and professionalism.

2.2 Harassment, bullying, or discrimination of any kind — based on gender, age, ethnicity, religion, disability, sexual orientation, or any other characteristic — will not be tolerated and may result in summary dismissal.
2.3 Employees must not engage in activities that create a conflict of interest with their duties at Nexora Solutions.
Any potential conflict must be disclosed to HR in writing.

text:
3.1 Employees must handle personal data, client data, and proprietary company information with the highest standard of care.
3.2 Confidential information must not be shared externally without authorisation. Non-disclosure agreements govern all external sharing of sensitive materials.
sentences: 3.1 Employees must handle personal data, client data, and proprietary company information with the highest standard of care.
3.2 Confidential information must not be shared externally without authorisation.
Non-disclosure agreements govern all external sharing of sensitive materials.

text:
4.1 Company devices, systems, and resources are provided for business purposes. Incidental personal use is permitted but must not interfere with work responsibilities.
4.2 Accessing, storing or distributing offensive, illegal or inappropriate content on company systems is grounds for disciplinary action.
sentences: 4.1 Company devices, systems, and resources are provided for business purposes.
Incidental personal use is permitted but must not interfere with work responsibilities.
4.2 Accessing, storing or distributing offensive, illegal or inappropriate content on company systems is grounds for disciplinary action.

text: Employees must not publish content that could damage Nexora Solutions's reputation or disclose confidential information. Personal opinions shared publicly must be clearly identified as personal, not representative of Nexora Solutions.
sentences: Employees must not publish content that could damage Nexora Solutions's reputation or disclose confidential information.
Personal opinions shared publicly must be clearly identified as personal, not representative of Nexora Solutions.

text: Employees who witness a breach of this code are encouraged to report it through the company's whistleblowing channel or directly to their HR Business Partner. All reports are treated confidentially.
sentences: Employees who witness a breach of this code are encouraged to report it through the company's whistleblowing channel or directly to their HR Business Partner.

text: This policy sets out how Nexora Solutions collects, processes, stores, and protects personal data in compliance with applicable data protection legislation, including GDPR where applicable.
sentences: This policy sets out how Nexora Solutions collects, processes, stores, and protects personal data in compliance with applicable data protection legislation, including GDPR where applicable.

text: Nexora Solutions commits to processing personal data lawfully, fairly, and transparently; collecting data only for specified, explicit, and legitimate purposes; keeping data accurate and up to date; retaining data no longer than necessary; and protecting data against unauthorised access, loss or destruction.
sentences: Nexora Solutions commits to processing personal data lawfully, fairly, and transparently; collecting data only for specified, explicit, and legitimate purposes; keeping data accurate and up to date; retaining data no longer than necessary; and protecting data against unauthorised access, loss or destruction.

text:
3.1 Nexora Solutions processes employee personal data for the purposes of employment administration, payroll, performance management, and legal compliance.
3.2 Employees have the right to access their personal data held by Nexora Solutions by submitting a Subject Access Request to the Data Protection Officer.
3.3 Salary and compensation data is classified as sensitive personal data and is accessible only to HR, Finance, and senior management with a legitimate business need.
sentences: 3.1 Nexora Solutions processes employee personal data for the purposes of employment administration, payroll, performance management, and legal compliance.
3.2 Employees have the right to access their personal data held by Nexora Solutions by submitting a Subject Access Request to the Data Protection Officer.
3.3 Salary and compensation data is classified as sensitive personal data and is accessible only to HR, Finance, and senior management with a legitimate business need.

text:
4.1 All personal data must be stored on company-approved systems. Local storage of personal data on unencrypted devices is prohibited.
4.2 Employees who access personal data as part of their role must complete annual data protection training.
4.3 Any data breach, actual or suspected, must be reported to the Data Protection Officer within 4 hours of discovery.
sentences: 4.1 All personal data must be stored on company-approved systems.
Local storage of personal data on unencrypted devices is prohibited.
4.2 Employees who access personal data as part of their role must complete annual data protection training.
4.3 Any data breach, actual or suspected, must be reported to the Data Protection Officer within 4 hours of discovery.

text: Employee personal data is retained for 7 years following the end of employment. Recruitment data for unsuccessful candidates is retained for 12 months.
sentences: Employee personal data is retained for 7 years following the end of employment.
Recruitment data for unsuccessful candidates is retained for 12 months.

text: This procedure sets out the process Nexora Solutions follows when addressing employee conduct or performance that falls below the expected standard.
sentences: This procedure sets out the process Nexora Solutions follows when addressing employee conduct or performance that falls below the expected standard.

text: This procedure applies to all permanent employees. A modified version applies to contractors as set out in their contracts.
sentences: This procedure applies to all permanent employees.
A modified version applies to contractors as set out in their contracts.

text:
3.1 Minor misconduct: lateness, minor breaches of company policy, low-level performance issues.
3.2 Serious misconduct: repeated policy breaches, insubordination, misuse of company resources, harassment.
3.3 Gross misconduct: theft, fraud, physical violence, serious data breaches, discrimination. Gross misconduct may result in summary dismissal without notice.
sentences: 3.1 Minor misconduct: lateness, minor breaches of company policy, low-level performance issues.
3.2 Serious misconduct: repeated policy breaches, insubordination, misuse of company resources, harassment.
3.3 Gross misconduct: theft, fraud, physical violence, serious data breaches, discrimination.
Gross misconduct may result in summary dismissal without notice.

text: For minor misconduct, the line manager addresses the issue informally through a documented conversation. A record is kept for 6 months. If the issue persists, formal proceedings are initiated.
sentences: For minor misconduct, the line manager addresses the issue informally through a documented conversation.
A record is kept for 6 months.
If the issue persists, formal proceedings are initiated.

text:
Step 1 — Investigation: HR appoints an investigating manager to gather facts. The employee is notified of the investigation in writing.
Step 2 — Disciplinary Hearing: The employee receives at least 5 working days' notice of the hearing and may be accompanied by a colleague or trade union representative.
Step 3 — Outcome: Possible outcomes include: written warning (valid 12 months), final written warning (valid 18 months), demotion, or dismissal.
Step 4 — Appeal: The employee may appeal within 10 working days of receiving the outcome.
sentences: Step 1 — Investigation: HR appoints an investigating manager to gather facts.
The employee is notified of the investigation in writing.
Step 2 — Disciplinary Hearing: The employee receives at least 5 working days' notice of the hearing and may be accompanied by a colleague or trade union representative.
Step 3 — Outcome: Possible outcomes include: written warning (valid 12 months), final written warning (valid 18 months), demotion, or dismissal.
Step 4 — Appeal: The employee may appeal within 10 working days of receiving the outcome.

3.1 Job advertisements will be written and placed to attract the widest possible pool of qualified candidates.
3.2 Interview panels will be trained in unconscious bias and structured interviewing techniques.

text: This policy outlines the procedures for claiming reimbursement of legitimate business expenses incurred by employees in the course of their duties.
sentences: This policy outlines the procedures for claiming reimbursement of legitimate business expenses incurred by employees in the course of their duties.

text:
The following categories of expenses are eligible for reimbursement subject to the limits set out in this policy:
- Business travel (flights, trains, taxis, car hire)
- Accommodation for overnight business trips
- Client entertainment and business meals
- Conference and training fees
- Home office equipment (subject to IT approval)
- Mobile phone and internet (where role requires remote connectivity)
sentences:
The following categories of expenses are eligible for reimbursement subject to the limits set out in this policy:
- Business travel (flights, trains, taxis, car hire)
- Accommodation for overnight business trips
- Client entertainment and business meals
- Conference and training fees
- Home office equipment (subject to IT approval)
- Mobile phone and internet (where role requires remote connectivity)

text:
3.1 Accommodation: Maximum £180 per night in London and major European capitals; £120 per night elsewhere.
3.2 Meals (without client): Maximum £40 per day.
3.3 Client entertainment: Maximum £75 per person per event. Requires prior approval from Head of Department for amounts exceeding £300 total.
3.4 Air travel: Economy class for flights under 5 hours. Business class permitted for flights over 5 hours subject to Finance Director approval.
3.5 Taxi / ride-hailing: Permitted for business travel. Personal commuting costs are not reimbursable.
sentences: 3.1 Accommodation: Maximum £180 per night in London and major European capitals; £120 per night elsewhere.
3.2 Meals (without client): Maximum £40 per day.
3.3 Client entertainment: Maximum £75 per person per event.
Requires prior approval from Head of Department for amounts exceeding £300 total.
3.4 Air travel: Economy class for flights under 5 hours.
Business class permitted for flights over 5 hours subject to Finance Director approval.
3.5 Taxi / ride-hailing: Permitted for business travel.
Personal commuting costs are not reimbursable.

text:
4.1 All expenses must be submitted within 30 calendar days of the date the expense was incurred.
4.2 Receipts must be provided for all individual expenses exceeding £10.
4.3 Expenses are submitted via the company expense management system and require line manager approval.
4.4 Approved expenses are reimbursed within the next monthly payroll cycle.
sentences: 4.1 All expenses must be submitted within 30 calendar days of the date the expense was incurred.
4.2 Receipts must be provided for all individual expenses exceeding £10.
4.3 Expenses are submitted via the company expense management system and require line manager approval.
4.4 Approved expenses are reimbursed within the next monthly payroll cycle.

text: The following are not eligible for reimbursement: personal purchases, alcohol consumed outside of approved client entertainment, fines or penalties, and expenses incurred by family members.
sentences: The following are not eligible for reimbursement: personal purchases, alcohol consumed outside of approved client entertainment, fines or penalties, and expenses incurred by family members.

text: Finance queries regarding expenses should be directed to finance@nexora.com.
sentences: Finance queries regarding expenses should be directed to finance@nexora.com.

text: Nexora Solutions recognises that employees may benefit from flexible working arrangements. This policy sets out the right to request flexible working and the process for doing so.
sentences: Nexora Solutions recognises that employees may benefit from flexible working arrangements.
This policy sets out the right to request flexible working and the process for doing so.

text: All employees with 26 weeks of continuous service have the statutory right to request flexible working. Nexora Solutions extends this right to employees from their first day of employment.
sentences: All employees with 26 weeks of continuous service have the statutory right to request flexible working.
Nexora Solutions extends this right to employees from their first day of employment.

text: Employees may request changes to: hours of work (start/finish times, compressed hours), days of work (part-time, term-time only), or location of work (remote/hybrid as covered separately in the Remote Work Policy).
sentences: Employees may request changes to: hours of work (start/finish times, compressed hours), days of work (part-time, term-time only), or location of work (remote/hybrid as covered separately in the Remote Work Policy).

text:
4.1 A flexible working request must be submitted in writing to the employee's line manager and HR Business Partner.
4.2 The request must specify the proposed arrangement, the desired start date, and an assessment of how the arrangement would impact the team.
4.3 Nexora Solutions will consider the request and issue a written decision within 3 months of the submission date.
sentences: 4.1 A flexible working request must be submitted in writing to the employee's line manager and HR Business Partner.
4.2 The request must specify the proposed arrangement, the desired start date, and an assessment of how the arrangement would impact the team.
4.3 Nexora Solutions will consider the request and issue a written decision within 3 months of the submission date.

text: A request may be refused on business grounds including: burden of additional cost, detrimental impact on ability to meet customer demand, inability to reorganise work among existing staff, or planned structural changes.
sentences: A request may be refused on business grounds including: burden of additional cost, detrimental impact on ability to meet customer demand, inability to reorganise work among existing staff, or planned structural changes.

text: Employees may appeal a refused request within 10 working days of receiving the decision. Appeals are considered by the HR Director.
sentences: Employees may appeal a refused request within 10 working days of receiving the decision.
Appeals are considered by the HR Director.

text: hr@nexora.com
sentences: hr@nexora.com

text: Nexora Solutions is committed to providing a fair and respectful working environment. This procedure enables employees to raise concerns or complaints about their working conditions, treatment, or colleagues in a structured and confidential manner.
sentences: Nexora Solutions is committed to providing a fair and respectful working environment.
This procedure enables employees to raise concerns or complaints about their working conditions, treatment, or colleagues in a structured and confidential manner.

text: This procedure applies to all employees and contractors working on Nexora Solutions premises or on behalf of Nexora Solutions.
sentences: This procedure applies to all employees and contractors working on Nexora Solutions premises or on behalf of Nexora Solutions.

text:
3.1 Employees are encouraged to resolve concerns informally in the first instance by discussing the matter directly with the individual involved or with their line manager.
3.2 If the grievance involves the line manager, the employee should approach the next level of management or their HR Business Partner directly.
sentences: 3.1 Employees are encouraged to resolve concerns informally in the first instance by discussing the matter directly with the individual involved or with their line manager.
3.2 If the grievance involves the line manager, the employee should approach the next level of management or their HR Business Partner directly.

text:
Step 1 — Written Submission: The employee submits a written grievance to their HR Business Partner, setting out the nature of the complaint and any relevant evidence or dates.
Step 2 — Acknowledgement: HR will acknowledge receipt within 5 working days and confirm the next steps.
Step 3 — Investigation: HR appoints an investigating manager, independent of the parties involved, to conduct a fair investigation. This may include interviews, document review, and witness statements.
Step 4 — Hearing: The employee is invited to a formal grievance hearing to present their case. Employees may be accompanied by a colleague or trade union representative.
Step 5 — Outcome: The investigating manager issues a written decision within 10 working days of the hearing.
Step 6 — Appeal: If dissatisfied with the outcome, the employee may appeal in writing to the HR Director within 10 working days of receiving the decision.
sentences: Step 1 — Written Submission: The employee submits a written grievance to their HR Business Partner, setting out the nature of the complaint and any relevant evidence or dates.
Step 2 — Acknowledgement: HR will acknowledge receipt within 5 working days and confirm the next steps.
Step 3 — Investigation: HR appoints an investigating manager, independent of the parties involved, to conduct a fair investigation.
This may include interviews, document review, and witness statements.
Step 4 — Hearing: The employee is invited to a formal grievance hearing to present their case.
Employees may be accompanied by a colleague or trade union representative.
Step 5 — Outcome: The investigating manager issues a written decision within 10 working days of the hearing.
Step 6 — Appeal: If dissatisfied with the outcome, the employee may appeal in writing to the HR Director within 10 working days of receiving the decision.

text: All parties involved in a grievance procedure are required to maintain strict confidentiality. Breach of confidentiality may result in disciplinary action.
sentences: All parties involved in a grievance procedure are required to maintain strict confidentiality.
Breach of confidentiality may result in disciplinary action.

text: To initiate a formal grievance, contact hr@nexora.com or your HR Business Partner directly.
sentences: To initiate a formal grievance, contact hr@nexora.com or your HR Business Partner directly.

text: This policy defines acceptable use of Nexora Solutions's IT systems, devices, and network infrastructure.
sentences: This policy defines acceptable use of Nexora Solutions's IT systems, devices, and network infrastructure.

text: All employees, contractors, and third parties accessing Nexora Solutions systems must comply with this policy.
sentences: All employees, contractors, and third parties accessing Nexora Solutions systems must comply with this policy.

text:
3.1 Company IT systems are provided for business use. Incidental personal use is permitted provided it does not consume excessive bandwidth, create legal risk, or interfere with work.
3.2 Employees must use strong passwords (minimum 12 characters, including upper/lowercase, numbers, and symbols) and must not share credentials with any other person.
3.3 Multi-factor authentication is mandatory for all systems where it is available.
sentences: 3.1 Company IT systems are provided for business use.
Incidental personal use is permitted provided it does not consume excessive bandwidth, create legal risk, or interfere with work.
3.2 Employees must use strong passwords (minimum 12 characters, including upper/lowercase, numbers, and symbols) and must not share credentials with any other person.
3.3 Multi-factor authentication is mandatory for all systems where it is available.

text: The following are strictly prohibited: accessing, downloading or distributing illegal content; attempting to access systems or data without authorisation; installing unauthorised software; disabling security tools or firewalls; using company systems for cryptocurrency mining or personal commercial activities.
sentences: The following are strictly prohibited: accessing, downloading or distributing illegal content; attempting to access systems or data without authorisation; installing unauthorised software; disabling security tools or firewalls; using company systems for cryptocurrency mining or personal commercial activities.

text: Nexora Solutions reserves the right to monitor use of its IT systems for security and compliance purposes. Employees have no expectation of privacy when using company systems.
sentences: Nexora Solutions reserves the right to monitor use of its IT systems for security and compliance purposes.
Employees have no expectation of privacy when using company systems.

text: Any security incident, suspected breach, or unusual system behaviour must be reported to the IT Security team immediately at security@nexora.com.
sentences: Any security incident, suspected breach, or unusual system behaviour must be reported to the IT Security team immediately at security@nexora.com.

sentences: security@nexora.com

sentences: Nexora Solutions invests in the continuous development of its employees.

text: All employees must complete the following training modules within their first 30 days and renew them annually: data protection and GDPR, information security awareness, code of conduct, anti-bribery and corruption, and health and safety fundamentals.
sentences: All employees must complete the following training modules within their first 30 days and renew them annually: data protection and GDPR, information security awareness, code of conduct, anti-bribery and corruption, and health and safety fundamentals.

text: Line managers are responsible for identifying role-specific training needs during performance reviews and onboarding. Agreed training is recorded in the employee's development plan in the HR system.
sentences: Line managers are responsible for identifying role-specific training needs during performance reviews and onboarding.
Agreed training is recorded in the employee's development plan in the HR system.

text:
4.1 Employees may request funding for external training or professional certifications relevant to their role.
4.2 Requests must be submitted to the line manager and HR Business Partner. Approved requests are funded from the departmental L&D budget.
4.3 The annual L&D budget allocation per employee is £1,500 for Band1–Band2 and £2,500 for Band3–Band5.
4.4 Employees who leave within 12 months of completing company-funded training valued above £500 may be required to repay a pro-rated amount.
sentences: 4.1 Employees may request funding for external training or professional certifications relevant to their role.

text: Nexora Solutions is committed to supporting employees through significant life events. This policy sets out the entitlements and procedures for maternity and paternity leave.
sentences: Nexora Solutions is committed to supporting employees through significant life events.
This policy sets out the entitlements and procedures for maternity and paternity leave.

text:
2.1 Eligible employees are entitled to 26 weeks of paid maternity leave at full salary, followed by up to 26 additional weeks of unpaid leave if desired.
2.2 To be eligible for paid maternity leave, an employee must have completed a minimum of 12 months of continuous employment with Nexora Solutions prior to the expected week of childbirth.
2.3 Employees with fewer than 12 months of service are entitled to statutory maternity pay in accordance with local employment law.
2.4 Maternity leave may begin up to 11 weeks before the expected due date. The employee must notify HR and their line manager at least 15 weeks before the expected due date.
sentences: 2.1 Eligible employees are entitled to 26 weeks of paid maternity leave at full salary, followed by up to 26 additional weeks of unpaid leave if desired.
2.2 To be eligible for paid maternity leave, an employee must have completed a minimum of 12 months of continuous employment with Nexora Solutions prior to the expected week of childbirth.
2.3 Employees with fewer than 12 months of service are entitled to statutory maternity pay in accordance with local employment law.
2.4 Maternity leave may begin up to 11 weeks before the expected due date.
The employee must notify HR and their line manager at least 15 weeks before the expected due date.

text:
3.1 Eligible employees are entitled to 4 weeks of paid paternity leave at full salary, to be taken within 56 days of the birth or adoption of the child.
3.2 Eligibility requires a minimum of 6 months of continuous employment at the time of the child's birth or adoption.
3.3 Paternity leave must be taken in a single continuous block unless otherwise agreed with the line manager and HR.
sentences: 3.1 Eligible employees are entitled to 4 weeks of paid paternity leave at full salary, to be taken within 56 days of the birth or adoption of the child.
3.2 Eligibility requires a minimum of 6 months of continuous employment at the time of the child's birth or adoption.
3.3 Paternity leave must be taken in a single continuous block unless otherwise agreed with the line manager and HR.

text:
4.1 Employees adopting a child are entitled to the same leave provisions as maternity leave.
4.2 Only one partner in a couple may claim adoption leave equivalent to maternity leave. The other partner is entitled to paternity leave provisions.
sentences: 4.1 Employees adopting a child are entitled to the same leave provisions as maternity leave.
4.2 Only one partner in a couple may claim adoption leave equivalent to maternity leave.
The other partner is entitled to paternity leave provisions.

text: Eligible employees may opt for shared parental leave in lieu of part of the maternity or adoption leave entitlement. Shared parental leave provisions are subject to applicable local legislation and must be agreed in advance with HR.
sentences: Eligible employees may opt for shared parental leave in lieu of part of the maternity or adoption leave entitlement.
Shared parental leave provisions are subject to applicable local legislation and must be agreed in advance with HR.

text:
6.1 Employees returning from maternity or adoption leave are entitled to return to the same role or, where this is not reasonably practicable, to a suitable alternative role at the same grade and salary.
6.2 Employees who wish to request a change to working hours or arrangements upon return must submit a flexible working request through the standard HR process.
sentences: 6.1 Employees returning from maternity or adoption leave are entitled to return to the same role or, where this is not reasonably practicable, to a suitable alternative role at the same grade and salary.
6.2 Employees who wish to request a change to working hours or arrangements upon return must submit a flexible working request through the standard HR process.

text: All maternity, paternity and adoption leave requests must be submitted to HR with supporting documentation (e.g. MATB1 form or adoption matching certificate) at least 8 weeks prior to the intended start of leave.
sentences: All maternity, paternity and adoption leave requests must be submitted to HR with supporting documentation (e.g.
MATB1 form or adoption matching certificate) at least 8 weeks prior to the intended start of leave.

text: Contact hr@nexora.com or your HR Business Partner for all maternity and paternity leave queries.
sentences: Contact hr@nexora.com or your HR Business Partner for all maternity and paternity leave queries.

text: This policy defines the onboarding process for all new employees and contractors joining Nexora Solutions, ensuring a consistent and effective introduction to the company, its culture, and their role.
sentences: This policy defines the onboarding process for all new employees and contractors joining Nexora Solutions, ensuring a consistent and effective introduction to the company, its culture, and their role.

text:
2.1 HR will send the new employee a welcome pack at least 5 working days before their start date, including: offer letter, contract, IT setup instructions, first-day schedule, and key contact information.
2.2 The line manager is responsible for preparing the new employee's workstation, system access, and a 30-60-90 day plan before the start date.
sentences: 2.1 HR will send the new employee a welcome pack at least 5 working days before their start date, including: offer letter, contract, IT setup instructions, first-day schedule, and key contact information.
2.2 The line manager is responsible for preparing the new employee's workstation, system access, and a 30-60-90 day plan before the start date.

text:
3.1 New employees are greeted by their HR Business Partner for a company induction session covering: company values, organisational structure, HR policies, benefits, IT security, and facilities.
3.2 IT provides a device setup session including VPN configuration, email setup, and security training.
3.3 The line manager conducts a role introduction meeting covering team structure, current priorities, tools, and initial objectives.

4. FIRST 30 DAYS
4.1 The new employee completes all mandatory online training modules within the first 30 days: data protection, code of conduct, security awareness, and anti-bribery.
4.2 One-to-one meetings with key stakeholders across the team and department are scheduled during the first two weeks.
4.3 A formal check-in meeting with the line manager occurs at the end of week 2 and week 4 to review progress and address any concerns.

5. FIRST 90 DAYS
5.1 A 90-day review meeting is held between the employee, their manager, and HR to assess progress, confirm successful completion of onboarding, and establish objectives for the remainder of the year.
5.2 Any concerns regarding performance or fit identified during the 90-day period are documented and addressed through a structured support plan before the probationary period ends.

3.2 IT provides a device setup session including VPN configuration, email setup, and security training.
3.3 The line manager conducts a role introduction meeting covering team structure, current priorities, tools, and initial objectives.

4.2 One-to-one meetings with key stakeholders across the team and department are scheduled during the first two weeks.
4.3 A formal check-in meeting with the line manager occurs at the end of week 2 and week 4 to review progress and address any concerns.

FIRST 90 DAYS

5.2 Any concerns regarding performance or fit identified during the 90-day period are documented and addressed through a structured support plan before the probationary period ends.

text: All new employees serve a 6-month probationary period. Confirmation of employment at the end of probation requires a satisfactory 90-day review and ongoing performance in line with role expectations.
sentences: All new employees serve a 6-month probationary period.
Confirmation of employment at the end of probation requires a satisfactory 90-day review and ongoing performance in line with role expectations.

text: Onboarding queries should be directed to hr@nexora.com or your assigned HR Business Partner.

text: This policy describes the performance management cycle at Nexora Solutions, including the review process, ratings, calibration, and outcomes.
sentences: This policy describes the performance management cycle at Nexora Solutions, including the review process, ratings, calibration, and outcomes.

text:
2.1 Nexora Solutions operates a bi-annual performance review cycle: Mid-Year Review (July) and Annual Review (December/January).
2.2 The Annual Review is the primary review for compensation decisions and promotion assessments.
2.3 The Mid-Year Review is a development-focused checkpoint and does not directly result in compensation changes.
sentences: 2.1 Nexora Solutions operates a bi-annual performance review cycle: Mid-Year Review (July) and Annual Review (December/January).
2.2 The Annual Review is the primary review for compensation decisions and promotion assessments.
2.3 The Mid-Year Review is a development-focused checkpoint and does not directly result in compensation changes.

text:
3.1 Self-Assessment: Employees complete a self-assessment form in the HR system two weeks before their scheduled review meeting.
3.2 Manager Assessment: Line managers complete an independent assessment prior to the review meeting.
3.3 Review Meeting: A structured one-to-one meeting between employee and manager to discuss performance, development goals, and feedback.
3.4 Calibration: Department heads and HR conduct calibration sessions to ensure consistency of ratings across teams.
sentences: 3.1 Self-Assessment: Employees complete a self-assessment form in the HR system two weeks before their scheduled review meeting.
3.2 Manager Assessment: Line managers complete an independent assessment prior to the review meeting.
3.3 Review Meeting: A structured one-to-one meeting between employee and manager to discuss performance, development goals, and feedback.
3.4 Calibration: Department heads and HR conduct calibration sessions to ensure consistency of ratings across teams.

text:
Performance is assessed on a five-point scale:
- 5 — Exceptional: Significantly exceeds expectations across all areas
- 4 — Exceeds Expectations: Consistently performs above role requirements
- 3 — Meets Expectations: Consistently performs in line with role requirements
- 2 — Partially Meets Expectations: Partially meets requirements; development plan required
- 1 — Does Not Meet Expectations: Performance improvement plan (PIP) initiated
sentences:
Performance is assessed on a five-point scale:
- 5 — Exceptional: Significantly exceeds expectations across all areas
- 4 — Exceeds Expectations: Consistently performs above role requirements
- 3 — Meets Expectations: Consistently performs in line with role requirements
- 2 — Partially Meets Expectations: Partially meets requirements; development plan required
- 1 — Does Not Meet Expectations: Performance improvement plan (PIP) initiated

text:
5.1 Salary reviews are conducted annually following the Annual Review and are informed by performance ratings, market data, and budget availability.
5.2 Promotions are assessed during the Annual Review cycle and require a minimum rating of 4 in the current year.
5.3 Employees rated 1 or 2 are placed on a structured Performance Improvement Plan with 90-day review intervals.
sentences: 5.1 Salary reviews are conducted annually following the Annual Review and are informed by performance ratings, market data, and budget availability.
5.2 Promotions are assessed during the Annual Review cycle and require a minimum rating of 4 in the current year.
5.3 Employees rated 1 or 2 are placed on a structured Performance Improvement Plan with 90-day review intervals.

text: Performance review queries should be directed to your HR Business Partner.
sentences: Performance review queries should be directed to your HR Business Partner.

text: This policy sets out the process Nexora Solutions follows when roles are made redundant, ensuring the process is fair, transparent, and compliant with employment law.
sentences: This policy sets out the process Nexora Solutions follows when roles are made redundant, ensuring the process is fair, transparent, and compliant with employment law.

text: Redundancy occurs when a role is no longer required due to business restructuring, cessation of a product or service, or reduction in headcount requirements. Redundancy is not a reflection of the individual employee's performance.
sentences: Redundancy occurs when a role is no longer required due to business restructuring, cessation of a product or service, or reduction in headcount requirements.
Redundancy is not a reflection of the individual employee's performance.

text:
3.1 Where a pool of employees is at risk of redundancy, selection criteria will be applied fairly and objectively. Criteria may include: skills and qualifications, performance history, attendance record, and length of service.
3.2 Employees will be informed of the selection criteria in advance.
sentences: 3.1 Where a pool of employees is at risk of redundancy, selection criteria will be applied fairly and objectively.
Criteria may include: skills and qualifications, performance history, attendance record, and length of service.
3.2 Employees will be informed of the selection criteria in advance.

text:
4.1 Nexora Solutions will enter into a genuine consultation period with affected employees before any redundancy decision is finalised.
4.2 For 20 or more redundancies, a minimum 45-day collective consultation period applies.
4.3 For fewer than 20 redundancies, a minimum individual consultation period of 2 weeks applies.
sentences: 4.1 Nexora Solutions will enter into a genuine consultation period with affected employees before any redundancy decision is finalised.
4.2 For 20 or more redundancies, a minimum 45-day collective consultation period applies.
4.3 For fewer than 20 redundancies, a minimum individual consultation period of 2 weeks applies.

text: Employees with 2 or more years of continuous service are entitled to statutory redundancy pay. Nexora Solutions provides an enhanced redundancy payment of 1.5 weeks' pay per year of service, up to a maximum of 20 years.
sentences: Employees with 2 or more years of continuous service are entitled to statutory redundancy pay.
Nexora Solutions provides an enhanced redundancy payment of 1.5 weeks' pay per year of service, up to a maximum of 20 years.

text: Standard contractual notice periods apply during redundancy. Employees may be offered pay in lieu of notice.
sentences: Standard contractual notice periods apply during redundancy.
Employees may be offered pay in lieu of notice.

text: hr@nexora.com
sentences: hr@nexora.com

text: Nexora Solutions supports flexible working arrangements that enable employees to balance professional effectiveness with personal wellbeing. This policy defines the conditions under which remote work is permitted.
sentences: Nexora Solutions supports flexible working arrangements that enable employees to balance professional effectiveness with personal wellbeing.
This policy defines the conditions under which remote work is permitted.

text: This policy applies to all permanent employees. Contractors may work remotely subject to the terms of their individual contracts and with explicit approval from their engagement manager.
sentences: This policy applies to all permanent employees.
Contractors may work remotely subject to the terms of their individual contracts and with explicit approval from their engagement manager.

text:
3.1 Eligible employees may work remotely for up to 3 days per week, subject to manager approval and role suitability.
3.2 A minimum of 2 days per week in the office is required for all permanent employees unless a full-remote exception has been granted in writing by the employee's Head of Department.
3.3 Roles designated as on-site (e.g. IT infrastructure, office operations) are not eligible for remote work without explicit approval.
3.4 Interns and employees within their first 3 months of employment are expected to work on-site full-time unless otherwise agreed.
sentences: 3.1 Eligible employees may work remotely for up to 3 days per week, subject to manager approval and role suitability.
3.2 A minimum of 2 days per week in the office is required for all permanent employees unless a full-remote exception has been granted in writing by the employee's Head of Department.
3.3 Roles designated as on-site (e.g.
IT infrastructure, office operations) are not eligible for remote work without explicit approval.
3.4 Interns and employees within their first 3 months of employment are expected to work on-site full-time unless otherwise agreed.

text:
4.1 Employees must discuss remote working arrangements with their direct line manager before commencing.
4.2 Remote work requests exceeding 3 days per week require written approval from both the line manager and the Head of Department.
4.3 Approved remote arrangements are reviewed annually or when a change in role occurs.
sentences: 4.1 Employees must discuss remote working arrangements with their direct line manager before commencing.
4.2 Remote work requests exceeding 3 days per week require written approval from both the line manager and the Head of Department.
4.3 Approved remote arrangements are reviewed annually or when a change in role occurs.

text:
5.1 Nexora Solutions provides a laptop and necessary software for remote work. Employees are responsible for maintaining a secure and productive home working environment.
5.2 Employees must use the company VPN at all times when accessing internal systems remotely.
5.3 Requests for additional equipment (external monitor, keyboard, etc.) may be submitted to IT for approval. Approved items are subject to a budget of £300 per employee per year.
sentences: 5.1 Nexora Solutions provides a laptop and necessary software for remote work.
Employees are responsible for maintaining a secure and productive home working environment.
5.2 Employees must use the company VPN at all times when accessing internal systems remotely.
5.3 Requests for additional equipment (external monitor, keyboard, etc.) may be submitted to IT for approval.
Approved items are subject to a budget of £300 per employee per year.

text:
6.1 Employees must ensure that confidential information is not visible to third parties during remote work sessions.
6.2 All work must be conducted on company-issued devices. Use of personal devices for work purposes is not permitted without explicit IT security approval.
6.3 Any security incident occurring during remote work must be reported immediately to the IT Security team.
sentences: 6.1 Employees must ensure that confidential information is not visible to third parties during remote work sessions.
6.2 All work must be conducted on company-issued devices.
Use of personal devices for work purposes is not permitted without explicit IT security approval.
6.3 Any security incident occurring during remote work must be reported immediately to the IT Security team.

text: Remote employees are expected to maintain the same level of availability and responsiveness as they would in the office during core hours (09:00–17:00 local time).
sentences: Remote employees are expected to maintain the same level of availability and responsiveness as they would in the office during core hours (09:00–17:00 local time).

text: Remote work queries should be directed to your line manager or HR Business Partner.
sentences: Remote work queries should be directed to your line manager or HR Business Partner.

text:
1.1 Full-time permanent employees are entitled to up to 10 days of fully paid sick leave per calendar year.
1.2 After 10 days, statutory sick pay applies in accordance with local legislation.
1.3 Part-time employees receive sick leave entitlement on a pro-rata basis.
1.4 Contractors are not entitled to company sick pay. Statutory provisions may apply depending on jurisdiction.
1.5 Interns receive 5 days of paid sick leave per year.
document_title: Sick Leave and Absence Management Policy
sentences: 1.1 Full-time permanent employees are entitled to up to 10 days of fully paid sick leave per calendar year.
1.2 After 10 days, statutory sick pay applies in accordance with local legislation.
1.3 Part-time employees receive sick leave entitlement on a pro-rata basis.
1.4 Contractors are not entitled to company sick pay.
Statutory provisions may apply depending on jurisdiction.
1.5 Interns receive 5 days of paid sick leave per year.

text:
2.1 Employees must notify their line manager and HR by 09:00 on the first day of any unplanned absence.
2.2 Notification must be by phone or messaging; email alone is not sufficient for same-day absences.
2.3 For absences exceeding 3 consecutive days, a medical certificate from a licensed physician must be submitted to HR.
document_title: Sick Leave and Absence Management Policy
sentences: 2.1 Employees must notify their line manager and HR by 09:00 on the first day of any unplanned absence.
2.2 Notification must be by phone or messaging; email alone is not sufficient for same-day absences.
2.3 For absences exceeding 3 consecutive days, a medical certificate from a licensed physician must be submitted to HR.

text:
3.1 A return-to-work interview is conducted by the line manager for absences of 3 or more consecutive days.
3.2 Where a pattern of short-term absences is identified, HR may request a medical assessment and implement a structured attendance improvement plan.
document_title: Sick Leave and Absence Management Policy
sentences: 3.1 A return-to-work interview is conducted by the line manager for absences of 3 or more consecutive days.
3.2 Where a pattern of short-term absences is identified, HR may request a medical assessment and implement a structured attendance improvement plan.

text: Employees absent for more than 4 consecutive weeks due to illness are managed under the Long-Term Sickness Absence procedure. HR will engage with the employee and their medical advisors to support a phased return to work where possible.
document_title: Sick Leave and Absence Management Policy
sentences: Employees absent for more than 4 consecutive weeks due to illness are managed under the Long-Term Sickness Absence procedure.
HR will engage with the employee and their medical advisors to support a phased return to work where possible.

text: This policy governs all business travel undertaken by employees on behalf of Nexora Solutions and ensures travel is conducted safely, efficiently, and cost-effectively.
sentences: This policy governs all business travel undertaken by employees on behalf of Nexora Solutions and ensures travel is conducted safely, efficiently, and cost-effectively.

text:
2.1 All business travel must be booked through the company's approved travel management platform.
2.2 Flights should be booked at least 14 days in advance where possible to minimise cost.
2.3 Economy class is the standard for all flights. Business class is permitted for flights exceeding 5 hours subject to Finance Director approval.
sentences: 2.1 All business travel must be booked through the company's approved travel management platform.
2.2 Flights should be booked at least 14 days in advance where possible to minimise cost.
2.3 Economy class is the standard for all flights.
Business class is permitted for flights exceeding 5 hours subject to Finance Director approval.

text: Accommodation must be booked through the approved travel platform. The maximum nightly rate is £180 in London and major capitals, £120 elsewhere. Exceptions require Finance Director approval.
sentences: Accommodation must be booked through the approved travel platform.
The maximum nightly rate is £180 in London and major capitals, £120 elsewhere.
Exceptions require Finance Director approval.

text:
4.1 All international travel requires pre-approval from the employee's Head of Department at least 5 working days in advance.
4.2 Employees travelling to regions designated as high-risk by the Foreign Office or equivalent must obtain explicit approval from the CEO and must register their travel with HR.
4.3 Travel insurance is provided automatically for all approved business travel. Employees must carry their travel insurance details when travelling.
sentences: 4.1 All international travel requires pre-approval from the employee's Head of Department at least 5 working days in advance.
4.2 Employees travelling to regions designated as high-risk by the Foreign Office or equivalent must obtain explicit approval from the CEO and must register their travel with HR.
4.3 Travel insurance is provided automatically for all approved business travel.
Employees must carry their travel insurance details when travelling.

text: Employees must follow all health and safety guidance relevant to their travel destination. Any illness or injury during a business trip must be reported to HR and the employee's manager within 24 hours.
sentences: Employees must follow all health and safety guidance relevant to their travel destination.
Any illness or injury during a business trip must be reported to HR and the employee's manager within 24 hours.

text: finance@nexora.com for travel booking queries; hr@nexora.com for health and safety during travel.
sentences: finance@nexora.com for travel booking queries; hr@nexora.com for health and safety during travel.

text: Nexora Solutions is committed to the highest standards of ethical conduct. This policy provides a safe and confidential channel for employees to raise genuine concerns about wrongdoing, legal breaches, or ethical violations without fear of retaliation.
sentences: Nexora Solutions is committed to the highest standards of ethical conduct.
This policy provides a safe and confidential channel for employees to raise genuine concerns about wrongdoing, legal breaches, or ethical violations without fear of retaliation.

text: This policy applies to all employees, contractors, and third-party partners who have concerns about activities at Nexora Solutions.
sentences: This policy applies to all employees, contractors, and third-party partners who have concerns about activities at Nexora Solutions.

text: Concerns that may be raised under this policy include: financial fraud or misreporting, bribery or corruption, serious health and safety violations, data protection breaches, environmental violations, and cover-up of any of the above.
sentences: Concerns that may be raised under this policy include: financial fraud or misreporting, bribery or corruption, serious health and safety violations, data protection breaches, environmental violations, and cover-up of any of the above.

text:
4.1 Employees may report concerns to their HR Business Partner, the General Counsel, or through the anonymous whistleblowing hotline at 0800-NEXORA-W.
4.2 Reports may be made anonymously. Anonymous reports will be investigated to the extent that the information provided allows.
sentences: 4.1 Employees may report concerns to their HR Business Partner, the General Counsel, or through the anonymous whistleblowing hotline at 0800-NEXORA-W.
4.2 Reports may be made anonymously.
Anonymous reports will be investigated to the extent that the information provided allows.

text: Any employee who makes a good-faith report under this policy will be protected from dismissal, demotion, harassment, or any other form of retaliation. Retaliation against a whistleblower is a serious disciplinary offence.
sentences: Any employee who makes a good-faith report under this policy will be protected from dismissal, demotion, harassment, or any other form of retaliation.
Retaliation against a whistleblower is a serious disciplinary offence.

text: All reports will be acknowledged within 5 working days. An independent investigation will be conducted, and the outcome communicated to the reporting employee (where not anonymous) within 30 working days.
sentences: All reports will be acknowledged within 5 working days.
An independent investigation will be conducted, and the outcome communicated to the reporting employee (where not anonymous) within 30 working days.

text: whistleblowing@nexora.com or 0800-NEXORA-W
sentences: whistleblowing@nexora.com or 0800-NEXORA-W
